Naval ROTC

The Naval ROTC program’s purpose is to educate and train qualified young men and women for service as commissioned officers in the United States Navy and Marine Corps. It prepares college students for leadership and management positions

For more information on registration eligibility, restrictions, and procedures, see registrar.umd.edu/registration/special- populations/usm-inter-institutional.

For additional information please call 301- 314-8250 or email registrar-help@umd.edu with the subject line, “Golden ID.”
